code_prompt_defaults.object_description_sticker_color_label: a Rubik-style cube net with face labels, a (column,row) coordinate reference, and four labeled color-swatch options; a prime mark means counterclockwise as viewed from outside the turned face
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_face_color_count_labe: a Rubik-style cube net with face labels, a Target color swatch, and four labeled number options; a prime mark means counterclockwise as viewed from outside the turned face
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_move_result_label: a Rubik-style starting cube net with face labels and four labeled candidate result nets; a prime mark means counterclockwise as viewed from outside the turned face

post_move_sticker_color_label: After applying moves {move_sequence_text}, choose the option matching the color at {target_position_description}.
Apply moves {move_sequence_text}. Which swatch matches the sticker at {target_position_description}?
After the move sequence {move_sequence_text}, select the color option for {target_position_description}.
Use moves {move_sequence_text}, then identify the sticker color at {target_position_description}.
Choose the swatch for {target_position_description} after applying {move_sequence_text}.
post_move_face_color_count_label: After applying moves {move_sequence_text}, count stickers matching the Target color swatch on the {target_face_name} face and choose the number option.
Apply {move_sequence_text}, then select the option for how many stickers on the {target_face_name} face match the Target color.
Use moves {move_sequence_text}; which number option counts stickers matching the Target color on the {target_face_name} face?
After the sequence {move_sequence_text}, choose the count of Target-color stickers on the {target_face_name} face.
Count stickers matching the Target swatch on the {target_face_name} face after applying {move_sequence_text}.
direct_sequence_result_label: Apply moves {move_sequence_text} to the starting net and choose the matching result net.
Which candidate net shows the state after applying {move_sequence_text}?
Select the result option produced by the move sequence {move_sequence_text}.
Use the start net, apply {move_sequence_text}, and choose the resulting candidate.
Choose the candidate net that matches the cube after moves {move_sequence_text}.
inverse_sequence_result_label: Choose the candidate net after undoing the move sequence {base_sequence_text}.
Which option shows the state after applying the inverse of {base_sequence_text}?
Select the candidate net produced by reversing and inverting {base_sequence_text}.
Use the start net and choose the result of undoing {base_sequence_text}.
Choose the candidate net that matches the inverse sequence for {base_sequence_text}.

task:post_move_sticker_color_label_query.answer_instruction: the selected option letter as a string
task:post_move_sticker_color_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected option panel.

task:post_move_face_color_count_label_qu.answer_instruction: the selected option letter as a string
task:post_move_face_color_count_label_qu.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected option panel.

task:rubiks_move_result_label_query.answer_instruction: the selected option letter as a string
task:rubiks_move_result_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected candidate-net option panel.
